race.comment: TARAMANSOUR (2) was quickly back on track just missing over this distance in the Hobart Cup. Draws inside today and carries 3.5kg less. The Stokes yard is flying, and under Luke Currie he will be hard to beat. ZIRYAB (9) missed a nose in the same contest leading them up. Maps to advantage and is likely to have taken some improvement. In an elite barn and will get every chance to go one better. DISTRUSTFUL AWARD (6) came from the back in the Hobart Cup beaten a short head. Won this race last year and is peaking at the right time. He will give away a start and come late. MAJOR BEEL (1) is a Group and Listed winner freshened by Waterhouse-Bott off a 4L defeat in a rich Magic Millions feature at the Gold Coast. has been kept up to the mark with a trial win at Canterbury and has won over this distance. Will race forward and has to be kept safe.
